rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relationship to Educ. Code §19.0041, which governs Windham School District program data collection and biennial reporting. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: To evaluate the effectiveness of its programs, the Windham School District shall compile and analyze information for each of its programs, including performance-based information and data related to academic, career and technical education, life skills, and postsecondary education programs.
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns correctional education program evaluation; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemptions. No intersection.
